angle: Simple swaps that cut the weekly shop without changing what you eat
hook: These grocery swaps could save you £20 this week
caption_direction: Lead with the total saving, list each swap with exact price difference, end with the save CTA. Keep it scannable.
caption_stub: I switched to own-brand on these and honestly could not tell the difference.
visual_direction: Side-by-side flat lay of branded vs own-brand items, warm light, short bold overlay showing the saving
cta: Save this before your next shop
notes: number-led swap content highest saves this month

angle: A real under-£3–5 weeknight dinner that takes under 20 minutes and actually tastes good
hook: A £3–5 weeknight dinner that actually tastes good
caption_direction: Show the finished dish first, list the key ingredients and rough cost, give one tip that makes it easier, end with the save CTA.
caption_stub: This is what I make when I need dinner fast and do not want to think about it.
visual_direction: Warm overhead kitchen light, ingredients laid flat, short text overlay maximum 6 words, no clutter
notes: consistent save rate across UK food accounts
